text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to BOLD?
explanation: Bold means showing willingness to take risks or be daring. Its antonym is timid, which means lacking courage or being shy and fearful.
wrongReasons: Brave is a synonym of bold, meaning ready to face danger without fear.
Daring is a synonym of bold, meaning willing to take risks.
Confident is closely related to bold, meaning feeling sure of oneself.
hebrewExplanation: bold = נועז, אמיץ. הפכו: timid = ביישן, פחדן. bold מתאר אומץ ונועזות, timid מתאר פחד וחוסר בטחון.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to ANCIENT?
explanation: Ancient means belonging to the very distant past. Its antonym is modern, which means relating to the present time or recent times.
wrongReasons: Historic is related to ancient, referring to things important in history.
Aged is a synonym of ancient, meaning very old.
Antique is a synonym of ancient, meaning old and often valuable.
hebrewExplanation: ancient = עתיק, קדום. הפכו: modern = מודרני, עכשווי. ancient מתאר את העבר הרחוק, modern מתאר את ההווה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to GENEROUS?
explanation: Generous means willing to give more than expected. Its antonym is stingy, which means unwilling to spend or give; mean with money or resources.
wrongReasons: Charitable is a synonym of generous, meaning willing to give to those in need.
Giving is a synonym of generous, meaning inclined to give freely.
Liberal is a synonym of generous in this context, meaning giving freely.
hebrewExplanation: generous = נדיב. הפכו: stingy = קמצן, כילי. generous מתאר נדיבות, stingy מתאר קמצנות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to HUMBLE?
explanation: Humble means having a low opinion of one's own importance; modest. Its antonym is arrogant, which means having an exaggerated sense of one's own importance.
wrongReasons: Modest is a synonym of humble, meaning not boastful or vain.
Meek is a synonym of humble, meaning quiet, gentle, and easily imposed on.
Unassuming is a synonym of humble, meaning not pretentious or arrogant.
hebrewExplanation: humble = עניו, צנוע. הפכו: arrogant = יהיר, מתנשא. humble מתאר צניעות, arrogant מתאר יהירות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to SWIFT?
explanation: Swift means moving or happening quickly. Its antonym is sluggish, which means slow-moving or lacking energy.
wrongReasons: Rapid is a synonym of swift, meaning happening in a short time.
Speedy is a synonym of swift, meaning moving quickly.
Hasty is a synonym of swift in some contexts, meaning done with excessive speed.
hebrewExplanation: swift = מהיר, זריז. הפכו: sluggish = אטי, כבד. swift מתאר מהירות, sluggish מתאר איטיות וחוסר אנרגיה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to GENUINE?
explanation: Genuine means truly what it is said to be; authentic. Its antonym is counterfeit, which means made in imitation of something to deceive.
wrongReasons: Authentic is a synonym of genuine, meaning of undisputed origin or quality.
Real is a synonym of genuine, meaning actually existing.
True is a synonym of genuine, meaning genuine and not false.
hebrewExplanation: genuine = אמיתי, מקורי. הפכו: counterfeit = מזויף, מוחלף. genuine מתאר מקוריות, counterfeit מתאר זיוף.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to RIGID?
explanation: Rigid means unable to bend or be forced out of shape; inflexible. Its antonym is flexible, which means capable of bending easily or adapting to change.
wrongReasons: Firm is a synonym of rigid, meaning not giving way under pressure.
Inflexible is a synonym of rigid, meaning unwilling to change.
Stiff is a synonym of rigid, meaning not easily bent.
hebrewExplanation: rigid = נוקשה, קשיח. הפכו: flexible = גמיש. rigid מתאר חוסר גמישות, flexible מתאר גמישות ויכולת הסתגלות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to FLAWLESS?
explanation: Flawless means without any imperfections or defects. Its antonym is defective, which means imperfect or faulty.
wrongReasons: Perfect is a synonym of flawless, meaning free from any flaw or defect.
Impeccable is a synonym of flawless, meaning in accordance with the highest standards.
Immaculate is a synonym of flawless, meaning perfectly clean or tidy.
hebrewExplanation: flawless = ללא דופי, מושלם. הפכו: defective = פגום, לקוי. flawless מתאר שלמות, defective מתאר פגם או ליקוי.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to DIMINISH?
explanation: Diminish means to make or become less. Its antonym is augment, which means to make something greater by adding to it; increase.
wrongReasons: Lessen is a synonym of diminish, meaning to make less.
Decrease is a synonym of diminish, meaning to become smaller in size or amount.
Reduce is a synonym of diminish, meaning to make smaller or less.
hebrewExplanation: diminish = להפחית, לצמצם. הפכו: augment = להגדיל, להרחיב. diminish מתאר הקטנה, augment מתאר הגדלה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to HOSTILE?
explanation: Hostile means showing or feeling opposition or dislike; unfriendly. Its antonym is amicable, which means having a spirit of friendliness.
wrongReasons: Aggressive is a synonym of hostile, meaning ready or likely to attack.
Antagonistic is a synonym of hostile, meaning showing or feeling active opposition.
Belligerent is a synonym of hostile, meaning hostile and aggressive.
hebrewExplanation: hostile = עוין, אגרסיבי. הפכו: amicable = ידידותי, בידידות. hostile מתאר עוינות, amicable מתאר יחסים ידידותיים.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to DEPLETE?
explanation: Deplete means to reduce something in quantity, size, or importance. Its antonym is replenish, which means to fill something up again.
wrongReasons: Exhaust is a synonym of deplete, meaning to use up completely.
Drain is a synonym of deplete, meaning to cause liquid or resources to flow away.
Consume is a synonym of deplete, meaning to use up a resource.
hebrewExplanation: deplete = לדלדל, לרוקן. הפכו: replenish = למלא מחדש. deplete מתאר התרוקנות, replenish מתאר מילוי מחדש.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to ELUSIVE?
explanation: Elusive means difficult to find, catch, or achieve. Its antonym is tangible, which means perceptible by touch; clear and definite; real.
wrongReasons: Evasive is a synonym of elusive, meaning tending to avoid commitment.
Slippery is a synonym of elusive in informal usage, meaning difficult to hold.
Fleeting is related to elusive, meaning lasting for a very short time.
hebrewExplanation: elusive = חמקמק, קשה לתפיסה. הפכו: tangible = מוחשי, ממשי. elusive מתאר משהו שקשה לתפוס, tangible מתאר משהו ממשי ומוחשי.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to FRUGAL?
explanation: Frugal means sparing or economical with money or food. Its antonym is extravagant, which means spending much more than is necessary.
wrongReasons: Thrifty is a synonym of frugal, meaning using money and resources carefully.
Economical is a synonym of frugal, meaning giving good value or return.
Sparing is a synonym of frugal, meaning moderate and economical in use of resources.
hebrewExplanation: frugal = חסכוני, מצומצם. הפכו: extravagant = בזבזני, מופרז. frugal מתאר חיסכון, extravagant מתאר בזבוז.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to BENEVOLENT?
explanation: Benevolent means well-meaning and kindly. Its antonym is malevolent, which means having or showing a wish to do evil to others.
wrongReasons: Kind is a synonym of benevolent, meaning friendly and generous.
Charitable is a synonym of benevolent, meaning generous to those in need.
Compassionate is a synonym of benevolent, meaning feeling concern for others' suffering.
hebrewExplanation: benevolent = טוב לב, נדיב. הפכו: malevolent = רשע, זדוני. benevolent מתאר כוונות טובות, malevolent מתאר כוונות רעות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to CONCEDE?
explanation: Concede means to admit that something is true or to give up. Its antonym is contest, which means to oppose or challenge.
wrongReasons: Acknowledge is a synonym of concede, meaning to accept or admit the existence of.
Admit is a synonym of concede, meaning to confess to be true.
Yield is a synonym of concede, meaning to give way to another.
hebrewExplanation: concede = להודות, לוותר. הפכו: contest = לערער, להתנגד. concede מתאר ויתור או הסכמה, contest מתאר התנגדות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to ELOQUENT?
explanation: Eloquent means fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing. Its antonym is incoherent, which means expressed in a way that is unclear and hard to understand.
wrongReasons: Articulate is a synonym of eloquent, meaning able to speak clearly and effectively.
Fluent is a synonym of eloquent, meaning speaking or writing smoothly.
Expressive is a synonym of eloquent, meaning effectively conveying thought or feeling.
hebrewExplanation: eloquent = רהוט, מבטא היטב. הפכו: incoherent = בלתי קוהרנטי, לא מובן. eloquent מתאר ביטוי ברור ומשכנע, incoherent מתאר ביטוי מבולבל.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to IMPEDE?
explanation: Impede means to delay or prevent something by obstructing it. Its antonym is expedite, which means to make something happen sooner or more quickly.
wrongReasons: Hinder is a synonym of impede, meaning to make it difficult for someone to do something.
Obstruct is a synonym of impede, meaning to block or be in the way of.
Hamper is a synonym of impede, meaning to hinder the movement or progress of.
hebrewExplanation: impede = לעכב, למנוע. הפכו: expedite = להאיץ, לזרז. impede מתאר עיכוב, expedite מתאר האצה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to SEGREGATE?
explanation: Segregate means to set apart from the rest or from each other; separate. Its antonym is integrate, which means to combine or bring together into a whole.
wrongReasons: Separate is a synonym of segregate, meaning to cause to move apart.
Isolate is a synonym of segregate, meaning to set apart from others.
Divide is a synonym of segregate, meaning to separate into parts.
hebrewExplanation: segregate = להפריד, לבודד. הפכו: integrate = לשלב, לאחד. segregate מתאר הפרדה, integrate מתאר שילוב ואיחוד.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to COVERT?
explanation: Covert means not openly acknowledged or displayed; secret. Its antonym is overt, which means done openly and not secretly.
wrongReasons: Secretive is a synonym of covert, meaning inclined to conceal feelings or information.
Clandestine is a synonym of covert, meaning kept secret especially because illicit.
Hidden is a synonym of covert, meaning kept out of sight.
hebrewExplanation: covert = סמוי, חשאי. הפכו: overt = גלוי, פומבי. covert מתאר פעולה חשאית, overt מתאר פעולה גלויה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to DEFY?
explanation: Defy means to openly resist or refuse to obey. Its antonym is comply, which means to act in accordance with a wish or command.
wrongReasons: Challenge is a synonym of defy, meaning to invite to a fight or dispute.
Resist is a synonym of defy, meaning to withstand the action of.
Confront is a synonym of defy, meaning to face up to and deal with.
hebrewExplanation: defy = למרוד, להתנגד. הפכו: comply = לציית, לעמוד בדרישות. defy מתאר מרד, comply מתאר ציות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to ARBITRARY?
explanation: Arbitrary means based on random choice or personal whim rather than reason or system. Its antonym is principled, which means acting according to a clear set of standards.
wrongReasons: Random is a synonym of arbitrary, meaning made without careful choice.
Capricious is a synonym of arbitrary, meaning given to sudden changes of mood.
Whimsical is a synonym of arbitrary, meaning playfully quaint or fanciful.
hebrewExplanation: arbitrary = שרירותי, אקראי. הפכו: principled = עקרוני, מנחה עקרונות. arbitrary מתאר החלטות ללא בסיס, principled מתאר פעולה לפי עקרונות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to LAMENT?
explanation: Lament means to feel or express grief or regret. Its antonym is rejoice, which means to feel or show great joy or delight.
wrongReasons: Mourn is a synonym of lament, meaning to feel sorrow for the death of someone.
Grieve is a synonym of lament, meaning to feel intense sorrow.
Deplore is a synonym of lament, meaning to feel or express strong disapproval.
hebrewExplanation: lament = להתאבל, לבכות. הפכו: rejoice = לשמוח, לגיל. lament מתאר צער ואבל, rejoice מתאר שמחה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to RECTIFY?
explanation: Rectify means to put something right; correct. Its antonym is worsen, which means to make something worse or become worse.
wrongReasons: Correct is a synonym of rectify, meaning to put right.
Remedy is a synonym of rectify, meaning to set right or improve.
Fix is a synonym of rectify, meaning to mend or repair.
hebrewExplanation: rectify = לתקן, לשפר. הפכו: worsen = להחמיר. rectify מתאר תיקון, worsen מתאר החמרה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to DETRIMENTAL?
explanation: Detrimental means tending to cause harm. Its antonym is beneficial, which means resulting in good; advantageous.
wrongReasons: Harmful is a synonym of detrimental, meaning causing or likely to cause harm.
Damaging is a synonym of detrimental, meaning causing harm.
Injurious is a synonym of detrimental, meaning causing injury; harmful.
hebrewExplanation: detrimental = מזיק, פוגע. הפכו: beneficial = מועיל, מיטיב. detrimental מתאר נזק, beneficial מתאר תועלת.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to PLAUSIBLE?
explanation: Plausible means seeming reasonable or probable. Its antonym is implausible, which means not seeming reasonable or probable.
wrongReasons: Credible is a synonym of plausible, meaning able to be believed.
Reasonable is a synonym of plausible, meaning having sound judgment.
Convincing is a synonym of plausible, meaning capable of causing belief.
hebrewExplanation: plausible = סביר, אמין. הפכו: implausible = לא סביר, לא אמין. plausible מתאר משהו שנראה הגיוני, implausible מתאר משהו לא הגיוני.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to VAGUE?
explanation: Vague means of uncertain or indefinite character or meaning. Its antonym is precise, which means marked by exactness and accuracy of expression or detail.
wrongReasons: Hazy is a synonym of vague, meaning indistinct or unclear.
Obscure is a synonym of vague, meaning not clearly expressed.
Unclear is a synonym of vague, meaning not easy to understand.
hebrewExplanation: vague = מעורפל, לא ברור. הפכו: precise = מדויק, ברור. vague מתאר חוסר בהירות, precise מתאר דיוק ובהירות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to DILIGENT?
explanation: Diligent means having or showing care and effort in work. Its antonym is negligent, which means failing to take proper care in doing something.
wrongReasons: Industrious is a synonym of diligent, meaning hardworking.
Hardworking is a synonym of diligent, meaning tending to work with effort.
Persistent is related to diligent, meaning continuing firmly despite difficulty.
hebrewExplanation: diligent = חרוץ, שקדן. הפכו: negligent = רשלן, לא זהיר. diligent מתאר שקידה ומאמץ, negligent מתאר רשלנות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to STEADFAST?
explanation: Steadfast means resolutely or dutifully firm and unwavering. Its antonym is vacillating, which means alternating between different opinions or actions; indecisive.
wrongReasons: Resolute is a synonym of steadfast, meaning admirably purposeful and determined.
Determined is a synonym of steadfast, meaning having made a firm decision.
Unwavering is a synonym of steadfast, meaning not wavering; steady.
hebrewExplanation: steadfast = נחוש, יציב. הפכו: vacillating = מתלבט, נע ונד. steadfast מתאר נחישות, vacillating מתאר חוסר החלטיות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to NOTORIOUS?
explanation: Notorious means famous for something bad. Its antonym is reputable, which means having a good reputation; respected.
wrongReasons: Infamous is a synonym of notorious, meaning well known for some bad quality.
Disreputable is a synonym of notorious, meaning not considered to be respectable.
Scandalous is a synonym of notorious, meaning causing general public outrage.
hebrewExplanation: notorious = ידוע לשמצה. הפכו: reputable = בעל שם טוב. notorious מתאר מוניטין שלילי, reputable מתאר מוניטין חיובי.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to PESSIMISTIC?
explanation: Pessimistic means tending to see the worst aspect of things or believe the worst will happen. Its antonym is sanguine, which means optimistic, especially in a difficult situation.
wrongReasons: Cynical is related to pessimistic, meaning distrustful of people's motives.
Gloomy is a synonym of pessimistic, meaning dark or poorly lit; depressing.
Despairing is a synonym of pessimistic, meaning showing loss of hope.
hebrewExplanation: pessimistic = פסימי, שלילי. הפכו: sanguine = אופטימי, מלא תקווה. pessimistic מתאר ייאוש, sanguine מתאר תקווה ואופטימיות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to RELUCTANT?
explanation: Reluctant means unwilling and hesitant; disinclined. Its antonym is eager, which means wanting to do or have something very much.
wrongReasons: Hesitant is a synonym of reluctant, meaning tentative; unsure.
Unwilling is a synonym of reluctant, meaning not ready, eager, or prepared to do.
Disinclined is a synonym of reluctant, meaning unwilling; reluctant.
hebrewExplanation: reluctant = מהסס, לא מוכן. הפכו: eager = להוט, נלהב. reluctant מתאר חוסר רצון, eager מתאר להיטות ורצון עז.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to FORTIFY?
explanation: Fortify means to strengthen a place against attack or make stronger. Its antonym is weaken, which means to make or become weaker.
wrongReasons: Strengthen is a synonym of fortify, meaning to make or become stronger.
Reinforce is a synonym of fortify, meaning to strengthen with additional material.
Bolster is a synonym of fortify, meaning to support or strengthen.
hebrewExplanation: fortify = לחזק, לבצר. הפכו: weaken = להחליש. fortify מתאר חיזוק, weaken מתאר החלשה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to TURBULENT?
explanation: Turbulent means characterized by conflict or unrest; moving in a chaotic way. Its antonym is serene, which means calm, peaceful, and untroubled.
wrongReasons: Chaotic is a synonym of turbulent, meaning in a state of complete disorder.
Stormy is a synonym of turbulent, meaning having strong winds and rain.
Tempestuous is a synonym of turbulent, meaning very stormy.
hebrewExplanation: turbulent = סוער, אלים. הפכו: serene = שליו, רגוע. turbulent מתאר סערה ותגלית, serene מתאר שקט ורוגע.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to CONDEMN?
explanation: Condemn means to express complete disapproval of. Its antonym is commend, which means to praise formally or officially.
wrongReasons: Censure is a synonym of condemn, meaning to express severe disapproval.
Denounce is a synonym of condemn, meaning to publicly declare to be wrong.
Criticize is a synonym of condemn, meaning to indicate faults; to judge unfavorably.
hebrewExplanation: condemn = לגנות, להאשים. הפכו: commend = לשבח, להמליץ. condemn מתאר גינוי, commend מתאר שבח.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to EQUIVOCAL?
explanation: Equivocal means open to more than one interpretation; ambiguous. Its antonym is unequivocal, which means leaving no doubt; unambiguous.
wrongReasons: Ambiguous is a synonym of equivocal, meaning open to more than one interpretation.
Vague is a synonym of equivocal, meaning of uncertain or indefinite character.
Evasive is a synonym of equivocal, meaning tending to avoid commitment.
hebrewExplanation: equivocal = דו-משמעי, מעורפל. הפכו: unequivocal = חד-משמעי, ברור. equivocal מתאר חוסר בהירות, unequivocal מתאר בהירות מוחלטת.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to LACONIC?
explanation: Laconic means using very few words. Its antonym is verbose, which means using or expressed in more words than are needed.
wrongReasons: Succinct is a synonym of laconic, meaning briefly and clearly expressed.
Terse is a synonym of laconic, meaning sparing with words; abrupt.
Brief is a synonym of laconic, meaning of short duration or length.
hebrewExplanation: laconic = תמציתי, קצר-לשון. הפכו: verbose = דברני, מלא מילים. laconic מתאר ביטוי בעמ מילים מועטות, verbose מתאר שימוש יתר במילים.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to SYCOPHANTIC?
explanation: Sycophantic means behaving in an obsequious way; excessively complimentary to gain favor. Its antonym is candid, which means truthful and straightforward, without flattery.
wrongReasons: Obsequious is a synonym of sycophantic, meaning obedient or attentive to an excessive degree.
Fawning is a synonym of sycophantic, meaning displaying exaggerated flattery.
Flattering is a synonym of sycophantic, meaning full of praise and compliments.
hebrewExplanation: sycophantic = חנפני, מחמיא בשקר. הפכו: candid = כן, גלוי לב. sycophantic מתאר חנופה, candid מתאר כנות וישירות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to PERFIDIOUS?
explanation: Perfidious means deceitful and untrustworthy. Its antonym is faithful, which means loyal, constant, and steadfast.
wrongReasons: Treacherous is a synonym of perfidious, meaning guilty of betrayal.
Deceitful is a synonym of perfidious, meaning guilty of deception.
Disloyal is a synonym of perfidious, meaning failing to be loyal.
hebrewExplanation: perfidious = בוגדני, מרמה. הפכו: faithful = נאמן. perfidious מתאר בגידה ורמאות, faithful מתאר נאמנות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to INIMICAL?
explanation: Inimical means tending to obstruct or harm; unfriendly or hostile. Its antonym is favorable, which means expressing approval or expressing a positive attitude.
wrongReasons: Hostile is a synonym of inimical, meaning showing opposition and dislike.
Adverse is a synonym of inimical, meaning preventing success or development.
Antagonistic is a synonym of inimical, meaning showing or feeling active opposition.
hebrewExplanation: inimical = עוין, מזיק. הפכו: favorable = נוח, חיובי. inimical מתאר עוינות או נזק, favorable מתאר תמיכה ותנאים חיוביים.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to MENDACIOUS?
explanation: Mendacious means not telling the truth; lying. Its antonym is veracious, which means speaking or representing the truth; truthful.
wrongReasons: Untruthful is a synonym of mendacious, meaning saying things that are not true.
Deceptive is a synonym of mendacious, meaning giving a false impression.
Dishonest is a synonym of mendacious, meaning not truthful or trustworthy.
hebrewExplanation: mendacious = שקרן, כוזב. הפכו: veracious = אמת-אומר, אמין. mendacious מתאר שקר, veracious מתאר אמיתות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to VOCIFEROUS?
explanation: Vociferous means making a loud, insistent outcry. Its antonym is reticent, which means not revealing one's thoughts or feelings readily; reserved and quiet.
wrongReasons: Clamorous is a synonym of vociferous, meaning making a loud and confused noise.
Strident is a synonym of vociferous, meaning loud and harsh.
Boisterous is a synonym of vociferous, meaning noisy, energetic, and cheerful.
hebrewExplanation: vociferous = רועש, קולני. הפכו: reticent = שקט, מסויג. vociferous מתאר רעש וצעקות, reticent מתאר עצור ושקט.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to INTRANSIGENT?
explanation: Intransigent means unwilling to change one's views or agree. Its antonym is amenable, which means open and responsive to suggestion; willing to cooperate.
wrongReasons: Obdurate is a synonym of intransigent, meaning stubbornly refusing to change.
Inflexible is a synonym of intransigent, meaning unwilling to change or compromise.
Unyielding is a synonym of intransigent, meaning not giving way; stubbornly determined.
hebrewExplanation: intransigent = עקשן, לא מוכן לפשרה. הפכו: amenable = נוח לעבוד איתו, פתוח. intransigent מתאר עקשנות, amenable מתאר פתיחות לשינוי.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to RECONDITE?
explanation: Recondite means not known by many people; obscure. Its antonym is accessible, which means friendly and easy to talk to; easy to understand.
wrongReasons: Abstruse is a synonym of recondite, meaning difficult to understand; obscure.
Esoteric is a synonym of recondite, meaning intended for a small group with specialized knowledge.
Arcane is a synonym of recondite, meaning understood by few; mysterious.
hebrewExplanation: recondite = נסתר, לא ידוע לרבים. הפכו: accessible = נגיש, מובן. recondite מתאר ידע מסתורי ומוסתר, accessible מתאר נגישות ופשטות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to ACRIMONIOUS?
explanation: Acrimonious means angry and bitter, especially in speech or manner. Its antonym is cordial, which means warm and friendly.
wrongReasons: Bitter is a synonym of acrimonious, meaning angry or resentful.
Caustic is a synonym of acrimonious, meaning sarcastic in a scathing way.
Vitriolic is a synonym of acrimonious, meaning filled with bitter criticism.
hebrewExplanation: acrimonious = מריר, עוקצני. הפכו: cordial = חם, ידידותי. acrimonious מתאר מרירות ועוינות, cordial מתאר חמימות וידידות.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to LOQUACIOUS?
explanation: Loquacious means tending to talk a great deal. Its antonym is taciturn, which means reserved or uncommunicative in speech; saying little.
wrongReasons: Garrulous is a synonym of loquacious, meaning excessively talkative.
Voluble is a synonym of loquacious, meaning talking fluently or incessantly.
Talkative is a synonym of loquacious, meaning fond of talking.
hebrewExplanation: loquacious = דברני, פטפטן. הפכו: taciturn = שתקן, לקצר מילים. loquacious מתאר נטייה לדבר הרבה, taciturn מתאר נטייה לדבר מעט.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to IMPERIOUS?
explanation: Imperious means assuming power or authority without justification; arrogant. Its antonym is deferential, which means showing respectful submission to another's opinion.
wrongReasons: Domineering is a synonym of imperious, meaning asserting one's will over others.
Overbearing is a synonym of imperious, meaning unpleasantly overpowering.
Authoritarian is a synonym of imperious, meaning favoring strict obedience to authority.
hebrewExplanation: imperious = שתלטן, שחצן. הפכו: deferential = כבוד-מוקדש, מכבד. imperious מתאר שלטנות, deferential מתאר ענווה וכבוד.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to NEFARIOUS?
explanation: Nefarious means wicked or criminal. Its antonym is virtuous, which means having or showing high moral standards.
wrongReasons: Wicked is a synonym of nefarious, meaning evil or morally wrong.
Villainous is a synonym of nefarious, meaning relating to, constituting, or guilty of wicked.
Heinous is a synonym of nefarious, meaning utterly odious or wicked.
hebrewExplanation: nefarious = רשע, פושע. הפכו: virtuous = מוסרי, צדיק. nefarious מתאר רשעות, virtuous מתאר מוסריות גבוהה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to TORPID?
explanation: Torpid means mentally or physically inactive; lethargic. Its antonym is vivacious, which means attractively lively and animated.
wrongReasons: Sluggish is a synonym of torpid, meaning slow-moving or inactive.
Lethargic is a synonym of torpid, meaning affected by lethargy; sluggish.
Dormant is a synonym of torpid, meaning having normal physical functions suspended.
hebrewExplanation: torpid = עצלני, רדום. הפכו: vivacious = חיוני, תוסס. torpid מתאר ניוון ועייפות, vivacious מתאר חיוניות ואנרגיה.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to INSIPID?
explanation: Insipid means lacking flavor or interest; dull. Its antonym is piquant, which means having a pleasantly sharp or appetizing taste; pleasantly stimulating or interesting.
wrongReasons: Bland is a synonym of insipid, meaning lacking strong features; dull and uninteresting.
Vapid is a synonym of insipid, meaning offering nothing stimulating or challenging.
Tasteless is a synonym of insipid, meaning lacking flavor.
hebrewExplanation: insipid = חסר טעם, משעמם. הפכו: piquant = חריף, מגרה. insipid מתאר חוסר טעם, piquant מתאר טעם חד ומעניין.

text: Which of the following is OPPOSITE in meaning to PUSILLANIMOUS?
explanation: Pusillanimous means showing a lack of courage or determination; timid. Its antonym is intrepid, which means fearless; adventurous.
wrongReasons: Cowardly is a synonym of pusillanimous, meaning lacking courage.
Timorous is a synonym of pusillanimous, meaning showing nervousness or fear.
Faint-hearted is a synonym of pusillanimous, meaning lacking courage or conviction.
hebrewExplanation: pusillanimous = פחדן, חסר אומץ. הפכו: intrepid = אמיץ, נועז. pusillanimous מתאר פחדנות, intrepid מתאר אומץ ונועזות.
